name: odoo-doodba-dev
description: Professional Odoo development toolkit for Doodba containers. USE AUTOMATICALLY for ANY Odoo development task: creating/modifying modules, models, fields, views, security, tests; searching Odoo code; debugging; validating references. Includes fast code indexer, specialized agents (analyst, implementer, validator, tester, documenter), and Doodba-integrated commands. AUTO-TRIGGER on keywords: odoo, doodba, addon, module, sale.order, res.partner, Many2one, _inherit, __manifest__.py, invoke, xmlid, form view, tree view. See CLAUDE.md for complete usage instructions.
